task: Port item CSS source blocks to Tailwind

_base.css: wh40k-item-sheet container: tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-h-full tw-overflow-hidden tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-sheet-bg)] tw-text-[var(--wh40k-text-dark)] on root div
form inside: tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-flex-1 tw-min-h-0 tw-overflow-hidden
Salvaged .wh40k-rpg.sheet.item .window-content rule as free-standing block before marker deletion
Scrollbar pseudo-element styles (::-webkit-scrollbar) left as cascade fallback — not portrable to Tailwind
_header.css: wh40k-item-image: tw-border-2 tw-border-[var(--wh40k-gold)] tw-shadow-[...] tw-transition-all hover:tw-scale-105
wh40k-item-title: tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-justify-center tw-gap-1 tw-min-w-0
wh40k-item-meta: tw-flex tw-flex-wrap tw-gap-1 tw-mt-1 tw-items-center
wh40k-meta-badge: tw-inline-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-[3px] tw-px-2 tw-py-[2px] tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-panel-bg-translucent)] tw-border... tw-text-xs
_tabs.css: wh40k-tabs nav: tw-flex tw-flex-shrink-0 tw-border-b-2 tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-color)] tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-panel-bg-translucent)]
wh40k-tab button inactive: tw-text-[var(--wh40k-text-muted)] tw-border-b-transparent hover:tw-text-[var(--wh40k-gold)] hover:tw-bg-[rgba(212,175,55,0.08)]
wh40k-tab-content: tw-flex-1 tw-overflow-y-auto tw-overflow-x-hidden tw-min-h-0 tw-p-3
wh40k-panel inside item sheet: tw-bg-[var(--wh40k-panel-bg)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-border-color-light)] tw-rounded-lg tw-overflow-hidden
wh40k-panel__header: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-between tw-px-3 tw-py-2 tw-bg-gradient-to-r tw-from-[rgba(212,175,55,0.15)] tw-to-transparent tw-border-b
wh40k-panel__actions: already had tw-flex in templates
_item-tabs.css: wh40k-talent-tabs / wh40k-trait-tabs / wh40k-origin-tabs nav: ported in prior session
wh40k-talent-tab / wh40k-trait-tab / wh40k-origin-tab active/inactive states: ported in prior session with system color vars
wh40k-talent-content / wh40k-trait-content / wh40k-origin-content: tw-flex-1 tw-overflow-y-auto tw-min-h-0 tw-p-3
_forms.css: wh40k-field: tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-gap-1 on each field div
wh40k-field-grid / wh40k-field-grid--2col / wh40k-field-grid--3col: tw-grid tw-grid-cols-N tw-gap-3
wh40k-description: class was dead code (no exact match in templates; wh40k-description-editor is different)
wh40k-empty-state: tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-p-4 tw-text-center tw-italic
_buttons.css: wh40k-btn base: tw-inline-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center on all wh40k-btn elements
